faqs.question: Who is this course designed for?
faqs.answer: This course is ideal for law students, fresh graduates, practicing advocates, in-house legal professionals, company secretaries, CAs, entrepreneurs, and anyone looking to master contract drafting and build practical legal skills.

faqs.question: Will the classes be live or recorded?
faqs.answer: The program is primarily delivered through live expert-led sessions. Recordings are also provided so you can revisit concepts and continue learning at your own pace.

faqs.question: Will I receive a certificate after completing the course?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upon successful completion of the course and required assignments, you'll receive a completion certificate from Lawctopus Law School. Merit certificates are also awarded to top-performing learners.

faqs.question: What makes the 6-month course different from the 2-month course?
faqs.answer: The 6-month Expert-Level Course includes 54+ live sessions, advanced contract drafting, freelancing modules, negotiation training, networking sessions, career support, extensive reading modules, and significantly more practical assignments with personalized feedback.

faqs.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
faqs.answer: Yes. The course comes with a 30-day money-back guarantee. Eligibility is subject to the completion requirements and refund policy outlined by Lawctopus Law School.

faqs.question: Will I receive personal feedback and mentorship?
faqs.answer: Yes. Throughout the program you'll receive detailed feedback on practical assignments, guidance from experienced faculty, and support from the learning management team to help you improve consistently.

faqs.question: Can this course help me start legal freelancing or improve my career?
faqs.answer: Yes. The curriculum includes dedicated freelancing and career sessions designed to help you build practical drafting skills, create a professional profile, work with clients, and confidently pursue legal opportunities.
